title: HAZARDOUS WASTE COLLECTION EVENT - 211info
text: CENTRO CULTURAL OF WASHINGTON COUNTY HAZARDOUS WASTE COLLECTION EVENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Hosting a Hazardous Waste Collection event to allow the safe disposal of medical syringes, needles, batteries, and other household hazardous materials — no appointment needed. Also accepting used electronics to donate to those in need. If you're bringing electronics, please include the cables. 1110 N Adair Street Cornelius, OR 97113 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: April 25, 2026 10am-1pm Email (503) 359-0446 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 359-0446 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Drive into parking lot at 1110 N Adair Street, Cornelius FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30AM-1PM, 2PM-6PM Friday 8:30AM-12:30PM Services: Recycling Sharps Disposal Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: ARTS AND CULTURE - PONTE LAS PILAS: RESILIENCE THRU ART If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTRO CULTURAL OF WASHINGTON COUNTY
